name: Sequenzy
description: Email marketing platform with native MCP server enabling complete agentic email workflows. Agents can create campaigns, manage subscribers, generate AI-powered content with account context, schedule sends, and analyze engagement—all programmatically.
pricing: Free up to 2,500 emails/mo, $29/mo for 50,000 emails
notes: Only email platform with native MCP server designed for agentic workflows. Purpose-built for autonomous agent operation with complete lifecycle control. AI content generation uses account context for personalization.
